mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esg.tb_legal_manage WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND confirmed_yn = 'Y' AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.*) FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE B.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT A.present_level as name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE B.comp_id = #{compId} AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY A.present_level ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT A.measure_level as name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_risk_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE B.comp_id = #{compId} AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY A.measure_level ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT COUNT(A.*) FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE B.comp_id = #{compId} AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT A.opp_level as name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities_opp_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risks_and_opportunities B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE B.comp_id = #{compId} AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY A.opp_level ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN A.result_validation_yn = 'N' THEN 'dashboard_actionPending' WHEN A.result_validation_yn = 'S' THEN 'dashboard_actionCompleted' WHEN A.result_validation_yn = 'F' THEN 'dashboard_nonConformance' ELSE '기타' -- 다른 값이 있을 경우를 대비한 처리 END AS name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_corrective_action_request A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.car_type = 'I' GROUP BY A.result_validation_yn ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN A.result_validation_yn = 'N' THEN 'dashboard_actionPending' WHEN A.result_validation_yn = 'S' THEN 'dashboard_actionCompleted' WHEN A.result_validation_yn = 'F' THEN 'dashboard_nonConformance' ELSE '기타' -- 다른 값이 있을 경우를 대비한 처리 END AS name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_corrective_action_request A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.car_type = 'E' GROUP BY A.result_validation_yn ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN A.validate = 'D' THEN 'dashboard_actionPending' WHEN A.validate = 'Y' THEN 'dashboard_actionCompleted' WHEN A.validate = 'N' THEN 'dashboard_nonConformance' ELSE '기타' -- 다른 값이 있을 경우를 대비한 처리 END AS name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_ohs_corractive_action_request A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY A.validate ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN A.action_orgn_nm = '' THEN '미설정' ELSE A.action_orgn_nm END AS name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_corrective_action_request A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.car_type='I' GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.action_orgn_nm = '' THEN '미설정' ELSE A.action_orgn_nm END ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN A.action_orgn_nm = '' THEN '미설정' ELSE A.action_orgn_nm END AS name, COUNT(A.*) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_corrective_action_request A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.car_type='E' GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.action_orgn_nm = '' THEN '미설정' ELSE A.action_orgn_nm END ORDER BY cnt DESC

select CASE WHEN t3.orgn_nm = '' THEN '미설정' ELSE t3.orgn_nm END AS name, COUNT(t.*) AS cnt from esg.tb_ohs_corractive_action_request t, esg.tb_audit_result_report t2, esg.tb_orgn_info t3 where t.doc_no = t2.doc_no and t.doc_seq = t2.doc_seq and t.use_yn = 'Y' and t2.use_yn = 'Y' and t2.orgn_id = t3.orgn_id group by t3.orgn_nm order by cnt desc

SELECT COUNT(B.*) FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report_detail B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y'

WITH categories AS ( SELECT 'dashboard_compliance' AS name UNION ALL SELECT 'dashboard_high' UNION ALL SELECT 'dashboard_medium' UNION ALL SELECT 'dashboard_low' ), categorized_data AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN B.achievement_rate >= 90 THEN 'dashboard_compliance' WHEN B.achievement_rate >= 80 THEN 'dashboard_high' WHEN B.achievement_rate >= 70 THEN 'dashboard_medium' ELSE 'dashboard_low' END AS name FROM esg.tb_evaluation_report A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_evaluation_report_detail B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT C.name, COUNT(D.*) AS cnt FROM categories C LEFT JOIN categorized_data D ON C.name = D.name GROUP BY C.name ORDER BY CASE WHEN C.name = 'dashboard_compliance' THEN 1 WHEN C.name = 'dashboard_high' THEN 2 WHEN C.name = 'dashboard_medium' THEN 3 WHEN C.name = 'dashboard_low' THEN 4 END

WITH audit_execution AS (SELECT O.ord_seq, O.orgn_nm, CASE WHEN E.signature != '' THEN 'dashboard_completed' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_audit_result_report_detail C WHERE C.write_year = D.write_year AND C.doc_no = D.doc_no AND C.doc_seq = D.doc_seq ) THEN 'dashboard_inProgress' ELSE 'dashboard_pending' END AS result_status FROM esg.tb_audit_execution_plan_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_audit_execution_plan B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_audit_result_report D ON D.write_year = A.write_year AND D.doc_no = A.doc_no AND A.doc_seq = D.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info E ON E.target_type = 'ARR' AND E.target_id = D.write_year || D.doc_no || D.doc_seq AND E.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info O ON O.orgn_id = A.orgn_id WHERE B.comp_id = #{compId} AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' AND (D.use_yn IS NULL OR D.use_yn = 'Y')
AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.audit_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY') = #{writeYear} ) SELECT orgn_nm, SUM(CASE WHEN result_status = 'dashboard_inProgress' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress, SUM(CASE WHEN result_status = 'dashboard_completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complete, SUM(CASE WHEN result_status = 'dashboard_pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting FROM audit_execution GROUP BY orgn_nm, ord_seq ORDER BY ord_seq

SELECT D.orgn_nm, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN B.doc_seq IS NOT NULL THEN (B.write_year, B.doc_type, B.doc_no, B.doc_seq) END) AS risk_reg_cnt, COUNT(C.reduction_measures) AS reduct_reg_cnt, COUNT(C.reduction_measures) AS reduct_act_cnt1, COUNT(CASE WHEN C.completed_date != '' AND C.completed_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS reduct_act_cnt2 FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan A INNER JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info D ON A.orgn_id = D.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no AND B.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction C ON B.write_year = C.write_year AND B.doc_type = C.doc_type AND B.doc_no = C.doc_no AND B.doc_seq = C.doc_seq AND C.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND ( -- START_DATE가 해당 연도에 포함되는 경우 (TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(#{writeYear}, 'YYYY') AND TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_DATE(#{writeYear}, 'YYYY') + INTERVAL '1 YEAR' - INTERVAL '1 DAY') OR -- END_DATE가 해당 연도에 포함되는 경우 (TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(#{writeYear}, 'YYYY') AND TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_DATE(#{writeYear}, 'YYYY') + INTERVAL '1 YEAR' - INTERVAL '1 DAY') OR -- 해당 연도가 START_DATE와 END_DATE 사이에 포함되는 경우 (TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_DATE(#{writeYear}, 'YYYY') AND TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(#{writeYear}, 'YYYY') + INTERVAL '1 YEAR' - INTERVAL '1 DAY') ) GROUP BY D.orgn_id, D.ord_seq ORDER BY D.ord_seq, D.orgn_id;

WITH near_miss AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.action_orgn_nm, '') = '' THEN '미설정' ELSE A.action_orgn_nm END AS action_orgn_nm, CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.action_orgn_nm, '') = '' THEN 99 ELSE O.ord_seq END AS ord_seq, CASE WHEN A.action_dt != '' THEN 'dashboard_completed' WHEN A.receipt_dt != '' THEN 'dashboard_inProgress' ELSE 'dashboard_pending' END AS name FROM esg.tb_near_miss_report A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info O ON O.orgn_id = A.action_orgn_id WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y'
AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.write_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY') = #{writeYear} ) SELECT action_orgn_nm as orgn_nm, SUM(CASE WHEN name = 'dashboard_completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complete, SUM(CASE WHEN name = 'dashboard_inProgress' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress, SUM(CASE WHEN name = 'dashboard_pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting FROM near_miss GROUP BY action_orgn_nm, ord_seq ORDER BY ord_seq
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esg.tb_hse_policy WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND confirm_yn = 'Y' AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(B.*) FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail B ON B.doc_type = A.doc_type AND B.doc_no = A.doc_no AND B.orgn_id = A.orgn_id WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROUND(COALESCE(d.budget, 0) / 10000.0)), 0) AS budget FROM esg.tb_action_master tam LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan a ON tam.write_year = a.write_year and tam.doc_type = a.doc_type and tam.doc_no = a.doc_no and tam.comp_id = a.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan b ON a.write_year = b.write_year AND a.comp_id = b.comp_id AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no AND a.doc_seq = b.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map c ON c.target_id = a.write_year || a.doc_no || a.doc_seq and c.target_type = tam.doc_type and c.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance d ON a.write_year = d.write_year AND a.comp_id = d.comp_id AND a.doc_no = d.doc_no AND a.doc_seq = d.doc_seq AND b.doc_detail_seq = d.doc_detail_seq and c.orgn_id = d.orgn_id WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} AND a.use_yn = 'Y' AND b.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROUND(COALESCE(d.performance_amount, 0) / 10000.0)), 0) as performance FROM esg.tb_action_objective_plan a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan b ON a.write_year = b.write_year and a.comp_id = b.comp_id and a.doc_type = b.doc_type AND a.doc_no = b.doc_no AND a.doc_seq = b.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance c ON a.write_year = c.write_year and a.comp_id = c.comp_id AND a.doc_type = c.doc_type AND a.doc_no = c.doc_no AND a.doc_seq = c.doc_seq AND b.doc_detail_seq = c.doc_detail_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance_detail d ON c.write_year = d.write_year AND a.comp_id = d.comp_id and c.doc_type = d.doc_type AND c.doc_no = d.doc_no AND c.doc_seq = d.doc_seq AND c.doc_detail_seq = d.doc_detail_seq AND c.doc_performance_seq = d.doc_performance_seq WHERE a.comp_id = #{compId} AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} AND a.use_yn = 'Y' AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND d.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT D.detail_plan AS safety_health_goal, 100 as objective_per, COUNT(CASE WHEN C.percent != '' THEN 1 END) as performance_cnt, CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN C.percent != '' THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(C.percent, '')::FLOAT, 0)) / COUNT(CASE WHEN C.percent != '' THEN 1 END) ELSE 0 END as per FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail B ON B.doc_type = A.doc_type AND B.doc_no = A.doc_no AND B.orgn_id = A.orgn_id AND B.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result C ON B.doc_no = C.doc_no AND B.write_year = C.write_year AND B.doc_seq = C.doc_seq AND (C.use_yn IS NULL OR C.use_yn = 'Y') LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan D ON B.write_year = D.write_year AND B.action_doc_no = D.doc_no AND B.action_doc_seq = D.doc_seq AND B.action_doc_detail_seq = D.doc_detail_seq AND D.use_yn = 'Y' AND D.comp_id = #{compId} WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY B.write_year, B.action_doc_type, B.action_doc_no, B.action_doc_seq, B.action_doc_detail_seq, D.detail_plan ORDER BY D.detail_plan

WITH date_series AS ( SELECT GENERATE_SERIES( (CURRENT_DATE - (COALESCE(#{searchText2},'7') || ' DAYS')::INTERVAL ) + INTERVAL '1 DAY', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 DAY' )::DATE AS tbm_date ), signatures AS ( SELECT target_type, target_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN signature IS NULL THEN 0 END) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS complete_yn FROM esg.tb_approval_info WHERE type IN ('attend', 'leader') GROUP BY target_type,target_id ) SELECT D.tbm_date, COALESCE(COUNT(A.*), 0) AS count_per_day, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN C.complete_yn = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS complete_per_day FROM date_series D LEFT JOIN esg.tb_toolboxmeeting A ON TO_DATE(A.tbm_date, 'YYYYMMDD') = D.tbm_date AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN signatures C ON C.target_type = A.doc_type AND C.target_id = A.write_year || A.doc_no GROUP BY D.tbm_date ORDER BY D.tbm_date;

WITH month_series AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{writeYear} || LPAD(i::text, 2, '0'), 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYYMM') AS training_month FROM generate_series(1, 12) AS s(i) ), implementation_data AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') AS training_month, COUNT(CASE WHEN B.hr_id != '' THEN 1 END) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_learner B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') ), result_data AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') AS training_month, COUNT(CASE WHEN B.signature != '' THEN 1 END) AS cnt FROM esg.tb_training_result_report A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info B ON B.target_type = A.doc_type AND B.target_id like A.write_year || A.doc_no || '%' AND B.type = 'attendee' WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') ) SELECT A.training_month, COALESCE(B.cnt, 0) AS plan_hr, COALESCE(C.cnt, 0) AS complete_hr FROM month_series A LEFT JOIN implementation_data B ON A.training_month = B.training_month LEFT JOIN result_data C ON A.training_month = C.training_month ORDER BY A.training_month
SELECT COUNT(A.*) FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y'

WITH month_series AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{writeYear} || LPAD(i::text, 2, '0'), 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYYMM') AS check_month FROM generate_series(1, 12) AS s(i) ), inspection_data as ( select TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') AS check_month, SUM(CASE WHEN B.acceptable_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS acceptable_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN B.non_compliant_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_compliant_cnt FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail B ON B.write_year = A.write_year AND B.doc_no = A.doc_no AND B.doc_type = A.doc_type AND B.check_dt = A.check_dt WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') ORDER BY check_month ) SELECT A.check_month, COALESCE(B.acceptable_cnt, 0) AS acceptable_cnt, COALESCE(B.non_compliant_cnt, 0) AS non_compliant_cnt FROM month_series A LEFT JOIN inspection_data B ON A.check_month = B.check_month ORDER BY A.check_month

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN B.chart_id != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS registered_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN B.chart_id IS NULL OR B.chart_id = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unregistered_cnt FROM esg.tb_orgn_info A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_organ_chart B ON A.orgn_id = B.orgn_id AND B.confirm_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y'

WITH process_data AS ( SELECT COUNT(A.*) AS process_count FROM esg.tb_process_info A WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' ), survey_data AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(survey_count), 0) AS total_survey_count FROM ( SELECT A.process_id, COALESCE(COUNT(B.process_id), 0) AS survey_count FROM esg.tb_process_info A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey B ON A.process_id = B.process_id AND B.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey_detail C ON B.write_year = C.write_year AND B.doc_type = C.doc_type AND B.doc_no = C.doc_no AND C.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work D ON D.prcs_work_id = C.prcs_work_id::int8 AND D.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE B.confirm_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY A.process_id ) sub ) SELECT sd.total_survey_count AS registered_cnt, pd.process_count - sd.total_survey_count AS unregistered_cnt FROM process_data pd, survey_data sd;

WITH total_orgn AS ( SELECT DISTINCT toi.orgn_id FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi WHERE toi.comp_id = #{compId} AND toi.use_yn = 'Y' ), confirmed_survey AS ( SELECT DISTINCT (A.write_year, A.doc_no) FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey A WHERE A.confirm_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' ), registered_orgn AS ( SELECT DISTINCT C.orgn_id FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds_analysis B ON A.process_id = B.process_id AND B.rev_no = A.rev_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds C ON C.write_year = B.write_year AND C.doc_type = B.doc_type AND C.doc_no = B.doc_no AND C.use_yn = 'Y' AND C.confirm_yn = 'Y' WHERE A.confirm_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.orgn_id) AS registered_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT t.orgn_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT r.orgn_id) AS unregistered_cnt FROM total_orgn t LEFT JOIN registered_orgn r ON t.orgn_id = r.orgn_id;

WITH classification_hazard_cnt AS ( SELECT A.doc_no, COUNT(B.doc_no) AS non_null_count FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_hazards B ON A.process_id = B.process_id AND B.process_work_rev_no = A.rev_no AND B.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY A.doc_no ) SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN non_null_count > 0 THEN 1 END) AS registered_cnt, COUNT(*) - COUNT(CASE WHEN non_null_count > 0 THEN 1 END) AS unregistered_cnt FROM classification_hazard_cnt;

WITH orgn_counts AS ( SELECT A.orgn_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(B.plan_nm) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_data FROM ESG.TB_ORGN_INFO A LEFT JOIN ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_PLAN B ON A.orgn_id = B.orgn_id AND B.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND B.comp_id = #{compId} WHERE A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} GROUP BY A.orgn_id ) SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN has_data = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS registered_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN has_data = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unregistered_cnt FROM orgn_counts;

WITH reduction_exist AS ( SELECT A.write_year, A.doc_no, B.doc_seq, CASE WHEN COUNT(C.doc_seq_detail) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_data FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no AND B.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction C ON C.write_year = B.write_year AND C.doc_type = B.doc_type AND C.doc_no = B.doc_no AND C.doc_seq = B.doc_seq AND C.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND B.doc_seq is not null GROUP BY A.write_year, A.doc_no, B.doc_seq ) SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN has_data = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS registered_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN has_data = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unregistered_cnt FROM reduction_exist;

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN C.completed_date IS NULL OR C.completed_date = '' THEN 1 END) AS unregistered_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN C.completed_date IS NOT NULL AND C.completed_date != '' THEN 1 END) AS registered_cnt FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction C ON C.write_year = B.write_year AND C.doc_type = B.doc_type AND C.doc_no = B.doc_no AND C.doc_seq = B.doc_seq WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.comp_id = #{compId} -- 감소대책만 체크하기 위해서 use_yn = null인것도 제외 AND A.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.use_yn = 'Y' AND C.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT D.MINOR_CD, D.MINOR_NM AS HAZARDS_TYPE_NM, COUNT(B.HAZARDS_TYPE) AS HAZARDS_CNT FROM ESG.TB_COMMON_D D LEFT JOIN ( SELECT B.* FROM ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_IMPLEMENTATION B JOIN ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_PLAN A ON A.WRITE_YEAR = B.WRITE_YEAR AND A.DOC_TYPE = B.DOC_TYPE AND A.DOC_NO = B.DOC_NO WHERE B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.COMP_ID = #{compId} ) B ON D.MINOR_CD= B.HAZARDS_TYPE WHERE D.MAJOR_CD = 'factor' AND D.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY D.MINOR_CD, D.MINOR_NM ORDER BY D.MINOR_CD
select t1.comp_id , t1.comp_nm , t1.zip_cd , t1.addrs1 , t1.addrs2 , t1.tel_no , t1.biz_cd , t1.biz_nm from esg.tb_company_info t1 where t1.use_yn = 'Y' order by t1.ord_seq ASC, t1.comp_id ASC
